events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail** — troweling bleed water back into the surface is a classic sequence violation under ACI 302.1R (finishing must wait until bleed water evaporates), and it's already produced a defective surface that will dust/scale. Work must stop, the surface evaluated and remediated (grinding/densifier or removal if severe), before any curing (ACI 308) is applied.
